# Code of Conduct

## Our Pledge

This is a personal open-source portfolio project. Everyone who interacts with it — through issues, pull requests, or discussions — is expected to be respectful and constructive.

## Expected Behaviour

- Use welcoming and inclusive language
- Be respectful of differing viewpoints and experiences
- Accept constructive feedback gracefully
- Focus on what is best for the project

## Unacceptable Behaviour

- Harassment, trolling, or personal attacks of any kind
- Publishing others' private information without permission
- Any conduct that would be considered inappropriate in a professional setting

## Enforcement

This repository is maintained solely by [@muneer-ahmed-khan](https://github.com/muneer-ahmed-khan). Violations may result in comments being removed or contributors being blocked at my discretion.

To report an issue, email **muneerkhan31886@gmail.com**.

## Attribution

This Code of Conduct is adapted from the [Contributor Covenant](https://www.contributor-covenant.org), version 2.1.
